title: carex ornithopoda subsp. elongata
intro: Carex ornithopoda subsp. elongata, also known as elongated sedge, is a subspecies of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The elongated sedge is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
